articles.title: DJI will pay $30K to the man who accidentally hacked 7,000 Romo robovacs
articles.description: On Valentine's Day, I brought you a story that's since made headlines all around the world: How one man, just trying to steer his DJI robot vacuum with a PlayStation gamepad, discovered an entire network of 7,000 remote-control DJI robots ready to let him peek into other people's homes. To be clear, DJI had already […]
articles.author: Sean Hollister
